summary: Iteration 35: Tested NewAppointmentDialog mobile usability fix on Planning page. All key features working correctly on mobile viewport (390x844). Dialog has sticky footer with save button, accordion-style service categories, checkmarks on selected services, and price/duration summary. Full appointment creation flow works with real clients.

minor.issue: 'Cliente Occasionale' button sets client_id='generic' which backend doesn't recognize - returns 'Cliente non trovato'. The 'Nuovo' client button works correctly.

passed_tests: MOBILE USABILITY TESTS (390x844 viewport):
1. Planning page loads correctly on mobile - PASS
2. 'Nuovo' button opens NewAppointmentDialog - PASS
3. Dialog title 'Nuovo Appuntamento' visible - PASS
4. Footer with 'Salva Appuntamento' button is always visible at bottom (y=744 on 844px viewport) - PASS
5. Save button remains visible after scrolling - PASS
6. All 6 service categories found as accordion blocks: taglio, piega, trattamento, colore, permanente, stiratura - PASS
7. Clicking category expands it showing services underneath - PASS
8. Services can be selected with visible checkmark - PASS
9. Footer shows count of selected services (e.g., '1 servizio - 10 min') - PASS
10. Footer shows total price (e.g., '€10.00') - PASS
11. Category header shows badge count of selected services (e.g., '1' badge on PIEGA) - PASS
12. 'Occasionale' button found and clickable - PASS
13. 'Nuovo' client button found and clickable - PASS
14. New client form appears with name and phone inputs - PASS
15. Client search autocomplete works - dropdown appears with matching clients - PASS
16. Full appointment creation flow works (select client, service, save) - PASS
17. Toast 'Appuntamento creato!' appears after successful save - PASS
18. Dialog closes after successful appointment creation - PASS
19. Appointment appears on Planning calendar after creation - PASS
failed_tests: 1. 'Cliente Occasionale' button - sets client_id='generic' which backend rejects with 'Cliente non trovato' - MINOR BUG (workaround: use 'Nuovo' button or search for real client)
action_items: MINOR: Fix 'Occasionale' button to properly handle generic client - either update handleSubmit to treat 'generic' like newClientMode, or change the button to use newClientMode with pre-filled name 'Cliente Occasionale'
critical_code_review_comments: NewAppointmentDialog.jsx: Line 214 sets client_id='generic' for Occasionale button, but handleSubmit (lines 127-169) only handles newClientMode case for null client_id. The 'generic' value is sent to backend which doesn't recognize it.
NewAppointmentDialog.jsx: Good implementation of sticky footer with 'shrink-0' class and flex layout. Footer is separate from scrollable content area.
NewAppointmentDialog.jsx: Accordion categories implemented correctly with data-testid attributes for testing.
NewAppointmentDialog.jsx: Service selection with checkmarks working correctly.

success_rate.frontend: 95% (18/19 tests passed, 1 minor issue with Occasionale button)

seed_data_creation: Created test appointment with Angela Manna client for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 35 verified mobile usability fix for NewAppointmentDialog. Key improvements: 1) Footer with save button is sticky at bottom, never covers content. 2) Service categories are collapsible accordion blocks with data-testid='toggle-cat-{catKey}'. 3) Services have checkmarks when selected. 4) Footer shows service count, duration, and price summary. 5) Category headers show badge count of selected services. Minor issue: 'Occasionale' button doesn't work (backend rejects 'generic' client_id) - use 'Nuovo' button or real client search instead.

sticky_footer.details: Footer with 'Salva Appuntamento' button is always visible at bottom of dialog (y=744 on 844px viewport). Uses 'shrink-0' class and is outside scrollable area.

accordion_categories.details: All 6 categories (taglio, piega, trattamento, colore, permanente, stiratura) are collapsible accordion blocks. Click to expand/collapse.

service_selection_checkmarks.details: Selected services show blue checkmark icon. Unselected services show empty circle.

footer_summary.details: Footer shows '1 servizio - 10 min' and '€10.00' when service selected.

category_badge_count.details: Category header shows badge with count of selected services (e.g., '1' badge on PIEGA when 1 service selected).

client_buttons.details: 'Nuovo' button works correctly (opens new client form). 'Occasionale' button has minor bug (backend rejects 'generic' client_id).

client_search.details: Typing in search input shows dropdown with matching clients. Clicking client selects them.

full_appointment_flow.details: Select client -> Select service -> Click Save -> Toast 'Appuntamento creato!' -> Dialog closes -> Appointment appears on calendar.
